message:
The other day, I found myself rummaging through the closet for our go-bags. You know, the ones I always talk about but somehow never fully packed? I pulled out a half-eaten granola bar, a mismatched sock, and a very confused cat who seemed to think this was some kind of new game. 😸

As I laughed at the chaos, it hit me: preparedness doesn’t mean being perfect; it’s about taking small steps. So, I decided to make a checklist and actually write down what we need. Because let’s be real, no one wants to be the one grabbing a sock instead of a flashlight in an emergency! 

This little refresher helped me get focused. Have you ever found something funny while trying to be prepared? I'd love to hear your stories!
